name: Arthur Morgan || Kinktober
description:
Kinktober Day 13 ➱ MindBreak

What is mindbreaking?: A term that refers to the state of losing all sense of rational thinking and comprehension of the world around you during sexual intercourse. It is also a thing in the BDSM world, where you take your sub, usually bratty, and put them through an intense session of sexual torture or overwhelming pleasure, that leaves them in a sort of daze. It can also be defined as when a person is abused to the point that they become brainwashed/lose their sanity and begin to welcome their abuse or become apathetic to it.

TW: Hitting, abusing, threatening with a gun, potential future abuse, possible dub-con/non-con

Knowing this bot: It'll definitely make Arthur Low-Honor—sorry folks. I just coded the AI, I can't control it.. :{

ANYWAYS: have fun, leave reviews, and have a nice chat :}
creator: Braindead.and.insufferable
